race.comment: SO MANY STORIES (6) finished off strongly to get the job done last time out by 0.4L. The rise in trip today looks ideal for her and McNaught remains in the saddle. She missed in a photo finish here two back, but on her past two efforts, she can get the job done this time. IDEALLY (1) looks better suited out to this trip now third-up into the campaign. He was a little disappointing on the quick turnaround last time out, but she's now 21 days between runs and Fiore sticks. Expecting a better performance now. JUST SUBLIME (2) flew home to just miss over 1L last time out as the race favourite and steps back out in trip today. Faithfull sticks with her and she's right in this on her recent form. MYSTICAL WISDOM (9) has placed at this track and trip previously and can't be discounted. ROYAL GUARDIAN (5) is better than she showed last time out and can improve getting out in trip now.
